summary: Completed comprehensive testing of XEMA Liquidity Execution Engine + OHLC Engine + Whale Detection enhancements - backend APIs working perfectly (96.6% success), frontend components fully functional with all required liquidity features implemented correctly

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 400 'subscription already trial' when user already has subscription

working_endpoints: /api/liquidity/status - returns dry_run:true, has_treasury_seed:false, community_wallet:'rJkpUojYKYArCRkrdDhaSMZzTw77r1UiMC', allocation_xema_pct:65, allocation_ops_pct:35, cron:'Sunday 20:00 UTC'
/api/liquidity/run-now?force=true&override_amount=200 - returns LiquidityExecution with status='dry_run', allocated_xema_xrp=130, allocated_ops_xrp=70, tx_hash starting with 'DRYRUN', dry_run=true
/api/liquidity/executions - returns execution items array with proper structure
/api/stats/subscriptions - enhanced with allocation (xema_pct=65, ops_pct=35, xema_support_xrp, ops_growth_xrp), community_wallet, dry_run fields
/api/amm/pairs/{id}/chart - returns OHLC data with synthetic:true, snapshot_count:0 (real OHLC engine ready)
/api/me - returns user info with subscription and slots

Landing page: 4-unit countdown timer ticking each second (06d15h22m52s format)

Landing page: Last support action displaying '0.00 XRP' and '2m ago · liquidity add dry run'
Landing page: Allocation bars showing correct widths - XEMA: 65%, Ops: 35%
CandlestickChart: Chart data source caption shows 'SYNTHETIC' badge (magenta) with snapshot count
CandlestickChart: OHLC engine ready - returns 120 synthetic points with proper OHLC structure
Regression: Live alerts panel continues to work correctly
Regression: Tier cards remain visible and functional
Regression: All previously working features still functional
verified_data_accuracy: Backend liquidity status API returns: dry_run: true, allocation_xema_pct: 65, allocation_ops_pct: 35, community_wallet: 'rJkpUojYKYArCRkrdDhaSMZzTw77r1UiMC'
Frontend displays match backend data exactly

Community wallet address correctly displayed and linked to XRPL explorer

OHLC engine returns synthetic data with 0 snapshots (accumulating real data)
Subscription destination address correctly set to community wallet
